name: opencode-agent
description: Native chat agent powered by the opencode CLI.

enumDescriptions: Prompt before opencode applies each file edit (the pending diff is shown in chat first).
Apply file edits immediately; review them afterwards via the Keep/Undo pills.
opencode.editApproval.description: Whether opencode must ask for approval before editing files. Edits are blocked until you respond; "Allow for Session" stops prompting until the window is reloaded.

opencode.systemPrompt.markdownDescription: Extra system instructions sent with every opencode turn. Appended **after** opencode's built-in agent prompt (it augments, never replaces it). Also editable from chat via `/system`.

opencode.commitMessageModel.markdownDescription: OpenRouter model slug used by **Generate Commit Message** in the Source Control input (e.g. `anthropic/claude-haiku-4.5` or another cheap, fast model). Authenticates with the `OPENROUTER_API_KEY` environment variable — the same one opencode's OpenRouter provider uses.

chatParticipants.name: opencode
chatParticipants.description: Ask opencode to build, edit, or explain code

commands.name: plan
commands.description: Run opencode in read-only Plan mode

commands.name: system
commands.description: Edit extra system instructions in a markdown editor (/system <text> sets inline, /system clear)

commands.name: usage
commands.description: Show context, token, and cost usage for this session
